impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving the PP&D-local archive adapter fails closed for non-public or private artifacts before handing anything to the ipfs_datasets_py processor backend.
summary: Add fixture-backed archive adapter refusal tests and a narrow preflight invocation boundary that blocks unsafe records before processor archival code can run.
target_task: Task checkbox-42: Add fixture tests for the PP&D archive adapter proving it refuses non-allowlisted URLs, private DevHub paths, raw response-body persistence, credentials, traces, screenshots, and downloaded private documents before invoking processor archival code.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
